title: Monday Apps for SAP integration to monday.com
excerpt: Is there any existing monday apps that we can allow the use of SAP to integrate with monday.com?

posts.author: joanneteh (Joanne Teh)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any existing monday apps that we can allow the use of SAP to integrate with monday.com?

posts.author: Renae-JTsCloud (Renae-upstream)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @joanneteh
my team is in the midst of building one.

Would love to have a chat to see if what we’re building will suit what you’re trying to achieve.
You can reach me at renae@jtscloud.com

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @joanneteh

That’s a great question and I am super excited myself to see what @Renae-JTsCloud and the JT Cloud team will be able to come up with I hope you do have the chat, as I’m sure your feedback will be a great place to start with in terms of building the actual integration and making it useful for as many people as possible.

-Alex
